title: PLC/bridge offline
next_check: Check the PLC bridge / Modbus link and that the gateway is polling the device.

title: GS10 RS-485 link down
message: vfd_comm_ok is FALSE - the PLC<->GS10 serial link is down; all VFD values are stale (frozen from the last good poll).
next_check: Reseat the RS-485 wiring PLC<->GS10; confirm baud/parity; power-cycle the drive.

title: GS10 drive fault active
message: GS10 reports fault code 21: oL (overload) - the drive has tripped (0x2100 low byte). Clear the cause and reset the drive.
next_check: Read the GS10 keypad fault, clear the cause, then reset the drive (STOP+RESET).

title: E-stop wiring fault
message: Dual-channel e-stop disagreement (DI_02 NC and DI_03 NO read the SAME) or the wiring-fault flag is set - broken/shorted e-stop wire; drive not permitted.
next_check: Inspect the dual-channel e-stop loop for a broken/shorted wire (DI_02 vs DI_03).

title: Direction fault
message: FWD (DI_00) and REV (DI_01) are both commanded - the PLC commands STOP.
next_check: Check the FWD/REV selector wiring -- both directions are commanded at once.

title: Belt running while not permitted
message: Motor reports RUNNING but it should not be: e-stop active.
next_check: Verify the safety interlock chain; the belt should not run while not permitted.

title: Drive not responding to RUN
message: Command word is RUN (18) for 4s but the motor is not running.
next_check: Confirm the GS10 is in remote/RUN-enabled mode and not faulted/locked.

title: Drive not responding to RUN
message: Command word is RUN (18) for 6s but the motor is not running.
next_check: Confirm the GS10 is in remote/RUN-enabled mode and not faulted/locked.

title: Output Hz not tracking setpoint
message: Commanded 30.0 Hz but output is 10.0 Hz (off by 20.0 Hz > 3.0) for 6s - drive not reaching commanded speed (mechanical drag, current-limit, or load).
next_check: Check for mechanical drag, a current-limit, or load -- drive can't hold speed.

title: VFD output over motor FLA
message: Output current 7.00 A exceeds motor FLA 5.00 A - possible overload/jam (cf. GS10 oL fault 21).
next_check: Inspect the belt/rollers for a jam or binding; compare current to motor FLA.

title: DC bus voltage out of range
message: DC bus 230 V is outside [250, 410] V (nominal ~327 V; low -> GS10 Lvd 12).
next_check: Check incoming supply voltage and the GS10 DC-bus (low->Lvd, high->ovd).

title: Drive not responding to RUN
message: Command word is RUN (18) for 6s but the motor is not running.
next_check: Confirm the GS10 is in remote/RUN-enabled mode and not faulted/locked.

title: Output frequency stuck at zero
message: Commanded RUN for 6s but output Hz is still 0 - the drive is not following the run command.
next_check: Drive commanded RUN but 0 Hz out -- check enable, fault latch, output wiring.

title: Photo-eye soft-stop (jam/blockage)
message: Photo-eye DI_05 latched a soft-stop - an object is blocking the infeed beam (jam/backup); the belt is held stopped until Start re-arms it.
next_check: Clear the object blocking the infeed photo-eye (DI_05), then re-arm with Start.
